name: Praline Crepes
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the praline sauce by melting butter in a heavy 2-quart saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add powdered sugar, dark corn syrup, dark rum, and chopped pecans to the melted butter.
3. Stir until all ingredients are well blended.
4. Cook, stirring often, for about 7 minutes or until the sauce thickens and becomes syrupy.
5. Set aside to cool slightly.
6. Prepare four sweet crepes according to your chosen recipe.
7. Serve each filled crepe on a plate with one scoop of frozen Creole cream cheese or vanilla ice cream, seam-side down.
8. Drizzle the praline sauce over the crepes.
9. Serve immediately.
Calories per serving: Not specified
Servings: 4
Fat grams per serving: Not specified
Cholesterol per serving: Not specified
